eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Benton; Franklin; Walla Walla, WA; at 08:16 AM ON APR 16, 2026 Effective until 11:16 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is Franklin County  Emergency Management conducting a required weekly test of the emergency alert system. If this were an actual emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
